testcase.name: test_get_all_products_returns_22_plus
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_catalog_features.py:19: in admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
